comments.author: @melluzi
comments.text: Cambodia is amazing and totally worth visiting. Been there several times and going again in a few months. However, at this point Khmer people need to decide whether they sell out their country the way they did with Sihanoukville already and it seems Koh Rong and Koh Rong Samloem are following soon, - or they will preserve their identity and uniqueness. Nobody will go to Cambodia to see China, this can be done in China itself.

comments.author: @travelnearme
comments.text: What moved me most was realizing that the true soul of Cambodia lies not only in the stones of Angkor, but also in the rhythm of village life, the floating communities on the rivers, and the deep bonds of family and tradition. I would love to watch the sunrise over Tonlé Sap Lake or spend a day in a stilt house village. Has anyone here ever visited Cambodia beyond Angkor Wat
